sources.title: Djinn (Full Movie) Horror, Thriller
sources.description:
A half-human, half-djinn (a shape-shifting demon) baby is taken from his mother.  Flash to an Emirati couple return home from a trip and discover that their new apartment has been built on a site that is home to some malevolent beings.

Directed by Tobe Hooper
2013
Starring Aiysha Hart, Razane Jammal, Paul Leubke

Edited for YouTube ad standards
